$pkg.name = "xiaotudou-desktop-pet"
$pkg.description = "小土豆AI桌宠 - 3D桌面宠物 语音控制 游戏操控 压力测试"
$pkg | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 | Out-File "C:\Users\ADMIN\oiia-cat-desktop-pet\package.json" -Encoding utf8
Write-Output "package.json updated"

@'
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2020",
    "module": "commonjs",
    "lib": ["ES2020", "DOM"],
    "outDir": "./dist",
    "rootDir": ".",
    "strict": false,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "declaration": true,
    "declarationMap": true,
    "sourceMap": true,
    "moduleResolution": "node",
    "allowJs": true,
    "checkJs": false,
    "noEmit": true,
    "types": ["node"]
  },
  "include": ["main.js", "preload.js", "test_runner.js"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules", "dist", "assets"]
}
'@ | Out-File -FilePath "C:\Users\ADMIN\oiia-cat-desktop-pet\tsconfig.json" -Encoding utf8

@'
@echo off
chcp 65001 >nul
echo.
echo   ╔══════════════════════════════════╗
echo   ║    🐱 小土豆AI桌宠 启动中...     ║
echo   ╚══════════════════════════════════╝
echo.
echo   功能:
echo     🎤 Ctrl+Shift+V = 语音控制开关
echo     🎮 Ctrl+Shift+G = 游戏模式开关
echo     🔬 Ctrl+Shift+T = 压力测试
echo     🔊 说话"小土豆"唤醒语音指令
echo.
cd /d "%~dp0"
npx electron .
pause
'@ | Out-File -FilePath "C:\Users\ADMIN\oiia-cat-desktop-pet\启动桌宠.bat" -Encoding utf8
